result.text:
My wife and I have some heartbreaking news to share: we lost our baby at 21 weeks 

We’re devastated, and I’ll likely quieter while we take time to grieve and heal. 

You may see me lurking when I'm looking for a distraction but family comes first

Thank you all for for the kindness you’ve shown us

legacy.full_text: @rcivNFT My deepest condolences, take care and find strength in each other. 🙏

@rcivNFT I’m so sorry for your family’s loss. I also lost my firstborn, and I understand how deeply that changes your view of the world. Please do your best to be there for your wife, and remember to take care of yourself too.
@rcivNFT So sorry to hear this, Ray. Stay strong 🙏💙

legacy.full_text: @rcivNFT So so sorry to hear that! It’s an incredibly painful experience, even more so for your wife. Terribly sorry you’re having to go through this and wish you both the best. Praying you get your rainbow baby someday. ❤️
